findings.message: User-supplied input from API payload is written to database without transformation. The name field from ItemCreate payload is passed directly to create_item() which persists it as-is. However, create_item_normalized() exists in the codebase specifically to normalize user input (strip whitespace and lowercase) and the function contract requires callers accepting user input to use create_item_normalized(), not bare create_item().
findings.suggestion: Change line 45 from 'return create_item(session, payload.name)' to 'return create_item_normalized(session, payload.name)' and update the import on line 9 to include create_item_normalized.
